name: context-os
description: Context optimization layer for Claude Code. Static-analysis RAG via UserPromptSubmit hook — Claude's first turn starts with file:line candidates from a pre-built repo graph (no embeddings, no server). Live `claude --print` A/B on 36 real calls: −40.9% aggregate tokens, 6/6 wins. Offline across 3 languages: MRR 0.938, +0.375 lift over filename-only baseline. Eleven slash commands (five query the graph), six Python hooks (auto_context, prewarm + graph autobuild, dedup, loop, file-size, session-profile), noise filtering, prompt caching, response shaping. 28 techniques, one installer.
